notableEvents.label: Shea Langeliers GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Shea Langeliers grounds into a double play, shortstop Jeremy Peña to second baseman Jose Altuve to first baseman Christian Walker. Denzel Clarke to 3rd. Nick Kurtz out at 2nd. Shea Langeliers out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Shea Langeliers rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Shea Langeliers grounds into a double play, shortstop Jeremy Peña to second baseman Jose Altuve to first baseman Christian Walker. Denzel Clarke to 3rd. Nick Kurtz out at 2nd. Shea Langeliers out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Max Muncy GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Max Muncy grounds into a double play, third baseman Nick Allen to second baseman Brice Matthews to first baseman Shay Whitcomb. Jacob Wilson to 3rd. Lawrence Butler out at 2nd. Max Muncy out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Max Muncy rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Max Muncy grounds into a double play, third baseman Nick Allen to second baseman Brice Matthews to first baseman Shay Whitcomb. Jacob Wilson to 3rd. Lawrence Butler out at 2nd. Max Muncy out at 1st.
